description: VS Code extension that embeds AI Intervention Agent in the sidebar to handle interactive_feedback workflows with multi-task tabs and countdown timers.
viewContainer.title: AI Intervention Agent
config.serverUrl.description: AI Intervention Agent server URL (recommended: full address with port, e.g. http://localhost:8080)
config.logLevel.description: Plugin log level (Output panel → AI Intervention Agent)
config.i18nPseudoLocale.description: Render the webview in the pseudo-locale (developer-only; visually tests every translatable string).
config.i18nPseudoLocale.markdownDescript: Render the webview in the pseudo-locale `[!ňöḉőńţéńț_ńēẉẗàśǩ!]` etc. so hardcoded strings, concatenation bugs, and overflow are visible at a glance. **Developer-only** — do not enable for daily use.
